ddls:
CREATE TABLE "marine_surveys" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey process */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Interval of sampling */,
  "layer" INTEGER /* Layer of water sampled */,
  "sv_mean" REAL /* Mean Sv value */,
  "nasc" REAL /* Normalized Acoustic Scattering Coefficient (NASC) */,
  "sv_max" REAL /* Maximum Sv value */,
  "sv_min" REAL /* Minimum Sv value */,
  "sv_noise" REAL /* Sv noise value */,
  "nasc_noise" REAL /* Noise for NASC */,
  "height_mean" REAL /* Mean height of the sampled layer */,
  "depth_mean" REAL /* Mean depth of the sampled layer */,
  "good_samples" INTEGER /* Number of good samples collected */,
  "layer_depth_min" REAL /* Minimum depth of the layer */,
  "layer_depth_max" REAL /* Maximum depth of the layer */,
  "ping_s" INTEGER /* Start ping time */,
  "ping_e" INTEGER /* End ping time */,
  "ping_m" INTEGER /* Mid ping time */,
  "dist_s" REAL /* Start distance */,
  "dist_e" REAL /* End distance */,
  "dist_m" REAL /* Mid distance */,
  "vl_start" REAL /* Vertical line start */,
  "vl_end" REAL /* Vertical line end */,
  "vl_mid" REAL /* Vertical line mid-point */,
  "date_s" TEXT /* Survey start date */,
  "time_s" TEXT /* Survey start time */,
  "date_e" TEXT /* Survey end date */,
  "time_e" TEXT /* Survey end time */,
  "date_m" TEXT /* Survey mid date */,
  "time_m" TEXT /* Survey mid time */,
  "lat_s" REAL /* Start latitude */,
  "lon_s" REAL /* Start longitude */,
  "lat_e" REAL /* End latitude */,
  "lon_e" REAL /* End longitude */,
  "lat_m" REAL /* Mid latitude */,
  "lon_m" REAL /* Mid longitude */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_surveys_layer FOREIGN KEY ("layer") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_surveys_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_surveys_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_surveys_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_surveys_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the layer */,
  "depth_min" REAL /* Minimum depth of the layer */,
  "depth_max" REAL /* Maximum depth of the layer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the layer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process related to this quality assessment */,
  "data_validity" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether data is valid (true/false) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the quality assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the process */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the process was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES marine_surveys ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment deployment */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process related to this deployment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment being deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was deployed */,
  "removal_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was removed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES marine_surveys ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment used (e.g., sonar, underwater camera) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process related to this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES marine_surveys ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process related to this history entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version related to this history entry */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_history_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES marine_surveys ("process_id")
)
